External teaching sample

Brief Studio

A small imported application that teaches AutoByteus app authors how to combine the frontend SDK, backend SDK, app-owned migrations, app-owned runtime orchestration, and durable execution-event projection.

Waiting for the host bootstrap payload…
Teaching details

The generic host only launches the application shell and prepares the backend. This app then chooses when to create a brief, which bundled resource to run, and which app-owned executionRef to bind.

Application
Waiting for bootstrap…
—
Launch
—
—
Backend gateway
—
—
—

Create a brief

This command creates an app-owned briefId and starts one bundled team run with executionRef = briefId.

The host does not preselect a runtime target or show a launch modal.

Briefs

Projected from lifecycle and artifact events keyed by app-owned execution refs.

No briefs yet. Create one to start an app-owned runtime binding.

Brief detail

Queries and commands flow through the platform-owned backend gateway.

Select a brief to inspect its projected artifacts, binding metadata, and review workflow.

Backend notifications

Optional app notifications fan out through the platform-owned application backend stream.

No notifications yet.
